g.title: KG
g.text: P5 prerequisite KG kept-only view after GPT-5.4 audit suggestions

a.xlink:title: The data and problem formulations that enabled 3D learning, including large object datasets, scanned scene data, and generative/discriminative/multimodal tasks.
Early neural approaches that either render 3D shapes into multiple images for 2D CNNs or directly process voxel grids with 3D convolution.

3D datasets and AI+geometry task space provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Multi-view and voxel-based 3D deep learning; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Differentiable nonlinear activation functions such as sigmoid, tanh, ReLU, and ReLU-like variants are needed so networks can model nonlinear functions and support gradient-based learning. The idea that activations between linear maps prevent the network from collapsing into a single linear transformation and allow nonlinear decision boundaries.
Model activations must be stored for backpropagation, scale with batch size, and are not automatically reduced by parameter or optimizer sharding.
Operational decision rule for choosing mixed precision, ZeRO stage 2 or 3, checkpointing, and LoRA based on hardware and memory constraints.

Activation memory as a separate bottleneck provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Practical fine-tuning decision flowchart; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Adam combines momentum and RMSProp-style adaptivity; AdamW decouples weight decay from moment estimation.
Learned mappings from low-dimensional parameter spaces or x,y,z queries to geometry, covering both patch-based surface decoders and occupancy/SDF-style networks.

Attention begins by comparing a decoder/query state with each candidate source state, then applying softmax to turn those scores into normalized attention weights. Attention scores can be computed with dot-product, bilinear/multiplicative, low-rank projected dot-product, or additive neural-net scoring.
A bottlenecked autoencoder learns compressed latent codes useful for representation learning, but plain reconstruction alone does not make the latent space sampleable for generation.
A VAE introduces latent variables z, a prior p(z), a decoder p_theta(x|z), and an encoder q_phi(z|x) that approximates the intractable posterior over latent codes.

Autoencoder bottlenecks and latent codes provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Variational autoencoder latent-variable model; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
The landscape of reference-based lexical and embedding-based automatic metrics used to score generated text.
Using human judgments as the gold standard and measuring whether automatic metrics agree with those judgments.

Automatic evaluation metrics for NLG provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Human-centered evaluation and metric alignment; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Training a model to predict the next token from its prefix, used directly for decoder pretraining and as a baseline pretraining objective more broadly. Autoregressive models make sequence modeling tractable by factoring p(x) into conditional next-part distributions over an ordered decomposition of x.
Training a causal decoder with next-token prediction, the foundation of GPT-style generative models.

Autoregressive language modeling provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Decoder-only pretraining; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
The failure mode where greedy or beam-style search produces repetitive, overconfident text in open-ended generation.

Autoregressive language modeling provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Degeneration under maximum-probability decoding; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Count-based next-word models that use a short Markov context, smoothing, and backoff.

Autoregressive language modeling provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand N-gram language models; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

A way to categorize generation tasks by how many valid outputs they permit, with entropy used as a formal intuition for openness. Open-ended tasks have many valid answers and graded quality, so evaluation must move beyond exact labels.

Direction repaired: Autoregressive language modeling is the more foundational concept and supplies the conceptual basis for Open-ended generation and evaluation. The original direction would have encoded the prerequisite relationship backwards.
Model action selection as next-token prediction over state-action histories and repeatedly query the model for the next action.
Generate agent training data by exploring environments, labeling trajectories with inferred instructions, and iteratively refining both.

Autoregressive trajectory modeling and prompting in a loop provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Synthetic demonstrations through exploration and relabeling; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Using axis arguments to reduce over dimensions and keepdims to preserve dimensionality.
The backward traversal of a computational graph that repeatedly applies the chain rule to obtain gradients for all relevant variables and parameters.

Benchmark scores can shift because of formatting, implementation differences, train-test leakage, or repeated tuning on public tests. The problem that benchmark examples may leak into pretraining data, undermining claims of true generalization.
Using a pretrained bidirectional encoder such as BERT for downstream tasks by attaching lightweight prediction heads and fine-tuning.

Masking blocks selected attention links by forcing their pre-softmax scores to negative infinity, which is essential for autoregressive language modeling. Future positions are masked in decoder self-attention so next-token prediction cannot cheat by reading words that come later in the sequence.

A prompting strategy that asks the model to generate intermediate reasoning before answering, either via exemplars or zero-shot prompting. Prompting with worked intermediate reasoning steps so the model generates a scratchpad before the final answer.
Use a strong teacher model to generate step-by-step explanations and fine-tune a smaller model on those explanations.

Chain-of-thought prompting provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Distilling reasoning traces into smaller models; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Reasoning quality should be tested by whether rationales causally affect answers and whether performance survives distribution shifts.

Chain-of-thought prompting provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Faithfulness and counterfactual evaluation of reasoning; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Gradients of composed scalar or vector functions are computed by multiplying derivatives or Jacobians along the computation path.

Direction repaired: Chain rule for composed functions is the more foundational concept and supplies the conceptual basis for Activation functions and nonlinearities. The original direction would have encoded the prerequisite relationship backwards.
Elementwise activations produce diagonal Jacobians, while affine maps such as Wx+b yield simple derivatives with respect to inputs and biases.

Chain rule for composed functions provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Layer-wise Jacobians for activations and affine maps; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Shared upstream error signals should be reused across parameter derivatives, and weight gradients often combine the upstream signal with the local input in an outer-product form.

Chain rule for composed functions provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Upstream gradient reuse and outer-product parameter gradients; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Pre-neural-network image pipelines that replaced raw pixels with human-designed descriptors such as color histograms or HOG before classification. The pre-deep-learning era emphasized parts, edges, grouping, matching, and handcrafted representations, with limited success on full recognition.

Why modern neural NLP depends on a set of training and modeling ideas that made deep networks workable after years of difficulty. Large-scale datasets, GPU computation, and neural architectures converged to unlock modern deep learning for vision.

Direction repaired: Classical computer vision and hand-crafted features is the more foundational concept and supplies the conceptual basis for Deep learning resurgence from data, compute, and scale. The original direction would have encoded the prerequisite relationship backwards.
CNNs pair convolutional feature extraction with classifier heads and were the dominant vision architecture from LeNet through the AlexNet era before transformers became more common.
All-reduce, reduce-scatter, all-gather, and reduce as the core synchronization operations behind DDP, ZeRO, and FSDP.

Stage-3 sharding scheme that partitions parameters, gradients, and optimizer state, then gathers per-layer weights on demand during forward and backward passes. A memory-saving variant of data parallelism that shards parameters, gradients, and optimizer state across GPUs and materializes weights on demand.

Collective communication primitives provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Fully Sharded Data Parallel (FSDP); the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
ZeRO stages 1 and 2 reduce memory by sharding optimizer state and then gradients across workers while preserving synchronized updates.

Collective communication primitives provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand ZeRO optimizer and gradient sharding; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Phrase meanings can be built compositionally over parse trees rather than only over flat token sequences.
An RNTN uses tensor-mediated interactions to model richer phrase composition than a standard recursive neural network.

Direction repaired: Compositional tree semantics is the more foundational concept and supplies the conceptual basis for Recursive neural tensor network. The original direction would have encoded the prerequisite relationship backwards.

General reverse-mode autodiff runs forward in topological order on a DAG and backward in reverse topological order, which is how modern frameworks implement backpropagation. A neural network can be understood as a directed acyclic graph of operations whose forward pass computes values and whose backward pass computes gradients.
The minimal implementation pattern for a small neural network: define dimensions and weights, run the forward pass, compute loss, backpropagate, and update parameters.

Computational graphs and automatic differentiation provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Forward pass and hand-built 2-layer training loop; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Central-difference finite-difference estimates provide a slow but useful way to verify that a manual backward implementation is correct. Finite-difference derivative approximations, exact calculus-based gradients, and implementation checks comparing the two.

Computational graphs and automatic differentiation provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Gradient checking; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

A standard PyTorch training loop combines forward computation, loss evaluation, backward gradient computation, and an optimizer step inside an epoch loop. Treating Hugging Face models as standard PyTorch modules inside a DataLoader-based training loop with optimizer and scheduler.

Computational graphs and automatic differentiation provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand PyTorch training loop; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Embedding explicit concepts inside agents enables targeted intervention studies that expose coordination structure and causal dependencies.
The output of attention is a context vector formed by weighting source hidden states with attention weights and summing them.
A general SSL formulation that attracts positive pairs and repels negatives, optimized with the InfoNCE objective.
SimCLR uses in-batch negatives and a projection head, while MoCo uses a momentum-updated key encoder and a queue to reduce batch-size dependence.

Contrastive learning and InfoNCE provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand SimCLR and MoCo design tradeoffs; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
A convolution layer preserves spatial structure by sliding small filters over local image patches and turning filter responses into activation maps.
Understanding filter count, kernel size, stride, padding, and the resulting input/output tensor shapes for convolution layers.

Convolution as local template matching provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Convolution hyperparameters and tensor shapes; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
The receptive field measures how much of the original image can affect a later activation; stride and downsampling let that field grow faster with depth.

Convolution as local template matching provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Receptive fields and strided downsampling; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

At each decoding step, compute scores between the decoder state and encoder states, normalize them with softmax, form a context vector, and combine it with the decoder state to predict the next token. Cross-attention uses one set of query vectors to retrieve information from a separate set of data vectors, often from another modality or sequence.

Transform raw class scores into probabilities with softmax and learn by minimizing the negative log probability of the correct class, equivalent here to maximum likelihood and cross-entropy under one-hot labels. For one-hot targets, cross entropy reduces to the model's log probability of the correct class and is optimized as negative log likelihood.
Connectionist Temporal Classification solves the mismatch between long neural sequences and shorter phoneme outputs when alignment is monotonic but unknown.
Modern LLM evaluation uses broad benchmark suites spanning math, knowledge, code, law, medicine, and other domains.

Current LLM benchmark suites and task coverage provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Benchmark contamination and overfitting; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Pre-deep-learning progress came from shifting from hand-coded rules to learnable statistical models trained from data. The collect-train-predict paradigm: gather labeled data, fit a model, and evaluate predictions on unseen examples.
A nonparametric classifier that stores all labeled examples and predicts by copying the label of the closest stored example.

Data-driven supervised learning pipeline provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Nearest neighbor classification; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
A baseline scaling method where each GPU processes a different minibatch shard, computes a local gradient, and synchronizes gradients across replicas.

Data Parallelism provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Fully Sharded Data Parallel (FSDP); the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Solving a task from examples placed directly in the prompt, without updating model parameters. Task behavior induced by prompts and examples without parameter updates.

Decoder-only pretraining provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand In-context learning; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
The family of stochastic decoding methods and hyperparameters such as top-k, top-p, epsilon, typical sampling, and temperature.

Degeneration under maximum-probability decoding provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Sampling-based decoding controls; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
A syntactic representation built from head-dependent relations, where each word is linked to the word it modifies or depends on.
The fact that one surface word sequence can support multiple syntactic analyses, especially through PP attachment, coordination scope, and modifier scope.

Dependency grammar provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Syntactic ambiguity and attachment; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
DETR uses learned decoder queries to emit a set of object predictions, each containing a class, a box, or a no-object output.
A discriminative model predicts labels or outputs conditioned on an input and allocates probability mass across possible y values for each fixed x.
Generative models allocate probability mass over possible data x, while conditional generative models do so within each conditioning signal y, enabling sampling and outlier rejection.

Discriminative modeling p(y|x) provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Generative modeling p(x) and conditional generation p(x|y); the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
The evidence lower bound keeps a reconstruction term and a KL-to-prior regularizer while discarding an intractable nonnegative KL term, yielding a tractable lower bound on log p(x).
Distinguishing *, np.matmul/@, and np.dot behavior with attention to dimensional compatibility.
Replacing hand-engineered feature stages with trainable image-processing operators that preserve spatial structure and are learned from data.

End-to-end learning for images provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand CNN architecture pattern and historical role; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

End-to-end learning for images provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Convolution as local template matching; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Neural next-word predictors that embed a limited context window and classify the next token with a softmax.
Implementation-level idea that FSDP efficiency depends on how layers are grouped into units and how communication is overlapped with computation.

Fully Sharded Data Parallel (FSDP) provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand FSDP sharding policy and communication overlap; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
A 2D composition of FSDP within groups and ordinary data parallelism across groups, chosen to better match cluster communication hierarchy.

Fully Sharded Data Parallel (FSDP) provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Hybrid Sharded Data Parallelism (HSDP); the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Generative modeling p(x) and conditional generation p(x|y) provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Autoregressive language modeling; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Maximum likelihood fits probabilistic models by choosing parameters that maximize the probability or log-probability of the observed dataset under an assumed density family.

Generative modeling p(x) and conditional generation p(x|y) provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Maximum likelihood estimation for density models; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Robot learning problems are structured around a task goal, current state, action choice, reward signal, and resulting next state.
The word2vec parameters are optimized by differentiating the log-softmax objective, yielding gradients that compare observed context vectors against the model’s expected prediction.

Neural networks are trained by computing the gradient of an objective and updating parameters with stochastic gradient descent. Gradient-based optimization updates parameters by subtracting a scaled gradient, with the learning rate controlling step size.
Using velocity or a running average of gradients to smooth updates and keep moving in useful directions.

Gradient descent and stochastic gradient descent provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Momentum optimizer; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Poor conditioning, overshoot, local minima, saddle points, and minibatch gradient noise.

Gradient descent and stochastic gradient descent provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand SGD failure modes; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
A recursive network can score and merge adjacent constituents greedily to build a binary parse and sentence representation.
A representation in which surface points satisfy a condition like f(x,y,z)=0, enabling inside/outside reasoning and later neural field methods.
A neural field that predicts density and color from spatial position and view direction, trained through differentiable rendering from 2D images.

Implicit functions for geometry provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Neural radiance fields and differentiable volume rendering; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Graphs built from intervention outcomes can reveal hidden social or coordination structure that raw statistics miss.
Token embeddings are projected into queries, keys, and values; dot-product scores are softmax-normalized and used to compute weighted sums of value vectors.

Instead of one attention operation, transformers run several attention heads in parallel on lower-dimensional projections and then combine their outputs. Multi-head attention runs several independent attention heads in parallel and fuses them, increasing capacity while staying hardware-friendly.

Key-query-value self-attention equations provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Multi-head self-attention; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
A multi-filter text CNN with max pooling and softmax classification that became the canonical early NLP CNN baseline.
Common regularization penalties and the lambda hyperparameter controlling penalty strength.
An agent receives observations from an environment and a language instruction, then selects actions to complete the instructed task.

Language-conditioned agents provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Autoregressive trajectory modeling and prompting in a loop; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Instead of directly learning a policy, a robot can learn how actions change the world and use that model to optimize future action sequences.
Linear classifiers are weak for vision because they compress each class into a single template and can only create linear decision boundaries.

Limits of linear classifiers provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Classical computer vision and hand-crafted features; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Limits of linear classifiers provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand End-to-end learning for images; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
A learned affine map f(x,W)=Wx+b that converts a flattened image into class scores.

Linear classifier as a parametric score function provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Cross-entropy loss and negative log likelihood; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Linear score functions, Softmax/cross-entropy, and dataset loss as an average of per-example losses.

Linear classifier scores and loss functions provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand L1, L2, elastic net, and lambda; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

The idea that more neurons increase expressive power and overfitting risk, so regularization—not shrinking the architecture by default—should control generalization. The view that very large networks can fit training data closely yet still generalize when regularization is chosen appropriately.

Linear classifier scores and loss functions provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Regularization and generalization; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Regularizers encode preferences such as L2 spread-out weights and L1 sparsity.

Linear classifier scores and loss functions provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Weight-preference effects of regularization; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
The representation of a parser decision state using the stack, buffer, nearby words, parts of speech, dependency labels, and other local structural cues.
A transition parser that replaces sparse symbolic features with embeddings and a nonlinear neural classifier over parser actions.

Local parser state and features provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Neural transition-based parser; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
The node-level view of backprop where each node multiplies its local derivative by an incoming upstream gradient to produce gradients for earlier nodes.
PEFT method that freezes base weights and learns a low-rank update for selected matrices, usually controlled by rank and scaling hyperparameters.
Mask R-CNN augments a detection pipeline with a per-instance mask head so each detected object also receives a pixel mask.
Corrupting input text and training an encoder to reconstruct masked tokens using bidirectional context.

Masked language modeling provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand BERT and encoder transfer; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
RL has produced dramatic wins in games and locomotion, yet still suffers from sample inefficiency, safety concerns, and limited robustness in many manipulation settings.

Model-free RL successes and sim-to-real limitations provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Learned forward dynamics for model-based planning; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Momentum optimizer provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Adam and AdamW; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

N-gram language models provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Fixed-window neural language models; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Neural MT uses an end-to-end encoder-decoder network that directly models target generation conditioned on a source sentence.
Single-neuron recordings are framed in terms of action potentials and spike trains measured near neurons.
Movement intent is inferred by combining noisy single-neuron tuning information across multiple channels and learning decision boundaries.

Neural spikes as the basic recorded unit provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Population decoding from noisy motor-cortex activity; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Detection extends classification by predicting both an object category and bounding-box coordinates for each object.

Object detection as joint classification and localization provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand DETR object queries; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Object detection as joint classification and localization provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Mask R-CNN for instance segmentation; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
YOLO predicts boxes and classes for all grid cells in a single pass and then filters them with confidence-based postprocessing.

Object detection as joint classification and localization provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand YOLO one-stage detection; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Latent-variable modeling of state-action traces can reveal recurring multi-agent behaviors without hand labeling every trajectory.

Observational discovery of emergent RL behaviors provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Concept bottlenecks for controllable RL interventions; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Observational discovery of emergent RL behaviors provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Inter-agent relationship graphs from interventions; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Building a speech decoder requires supervised paired recordings of neural activity and target utterances collected under clinical constraints.

Paired neural-text data collection provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand CTC for monotonic neural-to-phoneme alignment; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
The final system couples a GRU acoustic-style decoder with beam search, lexicon constraints, fast n-gram language modeling, and transformer reranking.

Paired neural-text data collection provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Real-time decoding stack with GRUs, beam search, and language models; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Representations that map a low-dimensional parameter domain such as t or (u,v) into points on a 2D or 3D shape.

Parametric curves and surfaces provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand AtlasNet and deep implicit shape decoders; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Fine-tuning approach that updates only a small subset of model parameters to reduce memory, storage, and sometimes overfitting risk. Adapting pretrained models by changing only a small number of parameters, such as prefixes, prompts, or low-rank weight updates.

Parameter-efficient fine-tuning provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand LoRA low-rank adaptation; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Pooling offers cheap spatial downsampling, and together with convolution exhibits translation equivariance, a property that matches how image content should be processed.
Max, average, local, and k-max pooling determine how local activations are summarized across a sentence.

Pooling strategies in text CNNs provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Kim 2014 sentence-classification CNN; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Receptive fields and strided downsampling provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Pooling and translation equivariance; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Recursive neural tensor network provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Greedy tree recursive parser; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
R-CNN, Fast R-CNN, and Faster R-CNN progressively reduce detection cost by sharing features and learning proposal generation.

Region proposals and the R-CNN progression provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Mask R-CNN for instance segmentation; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
VAE training samples latent variables through a differentiable reparameterization trick, and the resulting latent spaces often support sampling, interpolation, and axis-wise variation.

PyTorch supports reshaping tensors, reducing dimensions with operations like sum and mean, and NumPy-style slicing and indexing for selecting substructures. How (3,), (1,3), and (3,1) differ, and how reshape changes array dimensions when element counts match.

Reshaping and indexing provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Axis-based reductions and keepdims; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Reshaping and indexing provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Elementwise multiplication, matrix multiplication, and dot products; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Implementing neural computation with vectors, matrices, and tensors instead of explicit loops. Using NumPy indexing and array operations instead of slow Python loops over large matrices.

Reshaping and indexing provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Vectorization; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Shared-parameter sequence models that update a hidden state over time to summarize prior context. Updating a hidden state from current input and previous hidden state at every time step.
The standard training setup for autoregressive RNNs, including per-token loss, repeated-weight gradients, and truncated BPTT.

Recurrent neural networks provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Teacher forcing and backpropagation through time; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
LSTMs can label sequences, encode whole sentences, and generate outputs conditioned on other inputs.

RNN/LSTM applications and conditional language models provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Neural machine translation with sequence-to-sequence encoder-decoder models; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
Robot learning is distinguished from standard prediction problems because actions change the environment, generate new observations, and must be chosen over time to improve reward.

Robot learning as interactive sequential decision-making provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Goal-state-action-reward formulation; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Self-attention applies attention within one set of vectors by projecting each input into a query, key, and value so every element can mix information from the whole set. Each token can gather information from every token in the sequence in a single parallel operation, rather than relying on stepwise recurrence.

Self-attention provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Causal masking and masked self-attention; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

The same core block yields a decoder-only model with masking, an encoder-only model without masking, and an encoder-decoder model with cross-attention. A transformer block combines self-attention, residual connections, normalization, and an MLP/FFN, and a full transformer is a stack of these blocks.

Self-attention provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Transformer block architecture; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
The same transformer architecture supports next-token language models and vision transformers over image patches, and the lecture frames it as the dominant backbone for large AI models.

Self-attention provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Transformers as a cross-domain backbone; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Encoder-decoder RNNs compress the input sequence into one context vector, which limits performance on longer sequences because all input-output communication must pass through that fixed-size representation. A single encoder hidden state is too narrow a bottleneck for long source sentences, motivating selective access to all encoder states during decoding.

Seq2seq bottleneck motivation for attention provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Attention scoring and alignment weights; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Seq2seq bottleneck motivation for attention provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Context vector as a weighted sum; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Seq2seq bottleneck motivation for attention provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Encoder-decoder cross-attention; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.
How to pass tokenized inputs through a classification model, read logits, obtain loss, and convert logits to predicted labels.
The conditional probability of an outside word given a center word is defined by exponentiating dot products and normalizing over the vocabulary.

Softmax probability model for context prediction provides prerequisite conceptual machinery, motivation, or implementation context needed to understand Gradient-based learning and observed-minus-expected updates; the target specializes, applies, or operationalizes the source rather than merely co-occurring with it.

Word2vec learns embeddings by maximizing the probability of observed context words around a center word across a corpus. The skip-gram model predicts context words from a center word using dot products between center and outside vectors.
Words are represented as dense vectors in a high-dimensional space where semantic relationships correspond to geometric structure such as large dot products and clustered neighborhoods.
